publishedAbstract: - During the integration between OpenShift and ODF, only a single endpoint was configured, but later that changed to multiple endpoints. After an endpoint changing, the environment became unavailable during an update of the corresponding ODF node.- The following error messages are shown in the Rook operator logs: ``` 2024-11-18 19:00:24.580811 E | op-bucket-prov: failed to get storage class for OBC "bucket-name" in namespace "namespace-name". unable to Get storageclass "ocs-external-storagecluster-ceph-rgw": timed out waiting for the condition E1118 19:00:24.580837 1 controller.go:204] error syncing 'namespace-name/bucket-name': error provisioning bucket: unable to Get storageclass "ocs-external-storagecluster-ceph-rgw": timed out waiting for the condition, requeuing I1118 19:00:24.580860 1 controller.go:217] "msg"="reconciling claim" "key"="key-name/key-value" I1118 19:00:24.580869 1 helpers.go:107] "msg"="getting claim for key" "key"="key-name/key-value" I1118 19:00:24.583171 1 helpers.go:213] "msg"="getting ObjectBucketClaim's StorageClass" "key"="key-name/key-value" I1118 19:00:24.584651 1 helpers.go:218] "msg"="got StorageClass" "key"="key-name/key-value" "name"="ocs-external- storagecluster-ceph-rgw" I1118 19:00:24.584670 1 controller.go:270] "msg"="syncing obc creation" "key"="key-name/key-value" I1118 19:00:24.584687 1 controller.go:552] "msg"="updating OBC metadata" "key"="key-name/key-value" I1118 19:00:24.584701 1 resourcehandlers.go:277] "msg"="updating" "key"="key-name/key-value" "obc"="key-name/key-value" I1118 19:00:24.590130 1 controller.go:341] "msg"="provisioning" "bucket"="key-value-c9e270c9-def6-4bb2-8108-94b6721ae0d0" "key"="key-name/key-value" 2024-11-18 19:00:24.590141 I | op-bucket-prov: initializing and setting CreateOrGrant services 2024-11-18 19:00:24.590148 I | op-bucket-prov: getting storage class "ocs-external-storagecluster-ceph-rgw" 2024-11-18 19:00:24.590174 E | op-bucket-prov: error getting class "ocs-external-storagecluster-ceph-rgw", retrying. client rate limiter Wait returned an error: context canceled 2024-11-18 19:00:28.668568 E | op-bucket-prov: error getting class "key-value" in namespace "key-name". unable to Get storageclass "ocs-external-storagecluster-ceph-rgw": timed out waiting for the condition E1118 19:01:19.129837 1 controller.go:204] error syncing 'key-name/key-value': error provisioning bucket: unable to Get storageclass "ocs-external-storagecluster-ceph-rgw": timed out waiting for the condition, requeuing ```- Also, the application pods in publishedTitle: How to configure multiple OpenShift Data Foundation 4 management endpoints depending on the cluster configuration (external or internal)?
